notes: The response is almost entirely solution-framed (React frontend, CRUD workflow, functional areas list) with no articulated problem statement describing the gap/cost/affected party; it raises some genuine uncertainties (retention, auth model) but lacks personas with cost context, a bounded MVP with explicit deferrals, named out-of-scope items with reasons, any measurable success indicators, and critical constraints (Azure data residency, Privacy Act 2020 retention gap, Azure AD SSO) are missing or only partially surfaced.
